creator: chuynh@biolateral.com.au
text:
--- gff2ps.orig/Makefile        Wed Dec 19 15:15:05 2001
+++ gff2ps/Makefile     Wed Dec 19 15:16:43 2001
@@ -14,7 +14,8 @@

 MAINTAINER=    chuynh@biolateral.com.au

-RUN_DEPENDS=   gawk:${PORTSDIR}/lang/gawk
+RUN_DEPENDS=   gawk:${PORTSDIR}/lang/gawk \
+               bash:${PORTSDIR}/shells/bash2

 PATCH_WRKSRC=  ${WRKDIR}
 EXTRACT_AFTER_ARGS=    > ${WRKDIR}/gff2ps
